title: Medium Orientation (0x68)
description: Layout for triplet 0x68: Medium Orientation. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are intentionally not represented here.

elements.name: MedOrient
elements.description: Orientation of the medium presentation space (CODE, 1 byte).
